# Termicolor

> Generate terminal color schemes from images

Termicolor is a web application that extracts dominant colors from images and generates terminal color palettes. Users can upload any image and get a complete ANSI color scheme.

## Features
- Extract colors from uploaded images
- Live terminal preview with dark/light modes
- WCAG contrast analysis
- Export to: iTerm2, Alacritty, Kitty, Windows Terminal, Hyper, Terminal.app
- Import existing .itermcolors files
- Save and manage color profiles locally

## Usage
1. Visit https://termicolor.io
2. Upload an image or drag-and-drop
3. Adjust color mappings if needed
4. Export to your terminal format

## API
This is a client-side only application with no public API.

## Contact
Website: https://termicolor.io
